name: Google Meet
description: Google's video-conferencing service for one-on-one calls and group meetings, part of Google Workspace.

years.notes: Original Hangouts Meet app icon (March 2017 – October 2020). Material Teal 600 (#00897B) speech-bubble with a white camcorder. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the official Wikimedia wordmark SVG `Google_Meet_text_logo_dark_(2017-2020).svg` (icon embedded at viewBox 0 0 140 140), rescaled to 0 0 24 24 (scale 24/140). Three paths: teal bubble + tail (single closed path), light-grey lid band (#E0E0E0) overlaying the upper portion of the body and lens, and the white (#F5F5F5) camcorder body + right-pointing lens triangle. Drop-shadow and radial highlight from the source were intentionally dropped for a flat-rendered icon.

October 2020 Google Workspace rebrand — stylised camcorder in the four Google brand colours (green, yellow, red, blue) with darker green/blue shades for the lens and corner. Source viewBox 0 0 87.5 72 letter-boxed into 24x24 via a scale(0.27429) group with a 2.1257 vertical translation (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

2026 Workspace refresh — Meet drops the four-color treatment entirely for a flat yellow camcorder body (#FADE13→#FCCA03 gradient) with an amber lens triangle (#F9AC02) and a single white record-dot. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as a 24×24 SVG_STRING; the diamond-overlay highlight from the Figma source was dropped (no consumer-grade SVG diamond gradient primitive).
